message: Còn rất nhiều chương dịch không đúng quy tắc, chú thích, giải nghĩa thừa thãi
root_cause: The translation agent is appending English/Latin terms in parentheses next to the Vietnamese terms to explain them, and retaining author notes, violating the rule of no annotations without explicit instructions.
fix_applied: Added explicit forbidden patterns to global_config.json to block parenthetical explanations. Updated translation_config.json to forbid bilingual annotations.
